(;B[pp]TR[qo]TR[ro]SQ[rq]SQ[qp]SQ[rp]LB[oo:B]C[Playing here is worth about 10 points over playing away in an empty corner. The stones marked with a triangle are alive. The stones marked with a square are dead. White would have played at the same place if you played away. White would likely play at B next. RIGHT])
(;B[lq];W[pp]TR[qo]TR[ro]SQ[rq]SQ[qp]SQ[rp]C[This loses about 7 points. The stones marked with a triangle are weaker. The stones marked with a square are alive. ])
(;B[pn];W[pp]TR[qo]TR[ro]SQ[rq]SQ[qp]SQ[rp]C[This loses about 7 points. The stones marked with a triangle are dead. The stones marked with a square are alive. ])
(;B[rm];W[pn]TR[qo]TR[ro]SQ[rq]SQ[qp]SQ[rp]C[This loses about 11 points. The stones marked with a triangle are weaker. The stones marked with a square are alive. ]))
